title: erigeron rottleri
intro: Erigeron rottleri, also known as the Rottler's Fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Erigeron rottleri include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating digestive issues, as well as its use as a treatment for respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. Erigeron rottleri can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for a convenient and accessible way to harness its medicinal properties.
